title: Callista lancifolia
taxonomy: Callista lancifolia is classified as a species within the genus Callista and family Veneridae. This genus is a group of saltwater clams commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The family Veneridae, to which Callista lancifolia belongs, comprises a diverse group of marine bivalve mollusks. These bivalves are characterized by their distinctive two-part hinged shells and are often found in coastal waters and estuaries. The classification of Callista lancifolia reflects its unique characteristics and adaptations as a marine invertebrate species.
